# Pita Kabab
> Mediterranean & Middle Eastern cooking in Cedar Rapids

## NAP
- Name: Pita Kabab
- Address: 3100 6th St SW, Cedar Rapids, IA 52404
- Phone: +1-319-440-3709
- Email: owner@pitakabab.example

## Hours
Mon–Tue & Thu–Sat 10am–10pm · Sun 11am–8pm · Closed Wednesday (hours as published by the restaurant — please call to confirm)

## Domain
https://pitakabab.example

## Description
Pita Kabab is a counter-service Mediterranean and Middle Eastern restaurant at 3100 6th St SW in Cedar Rapids, Iowa, serving shawarma, kabobs, falafel, hummus, wings and baklava for takeout, dine-in, delivery and catering.

## Owner
Ray Aqel

## Year Established
2025
